title: Feather | Lightweight Vanilla+ Modpack
description: A sleek and minimal Vanilla+ modpack designed for players who want a little extra—without losing the charm of the vanilla Minecraft experience.
body:
# 🌿 Feather | Lightweight Vanilla+ Modpack **Feather** is a sleek and minimal **Vanilla+ modpack** designed for players who want a little extra—without losing the charm of the vanilla Minecraft experience. Built for both **Fabric and Quilt**, Feather includes a handpicked selection of **client-side only** mods that enhance visuals, improve performance, and add subtle quality-of-life upgrades. Whether you're playing in **singleplayer** or on a **multiplayer server**, Feather makes your game feel smoother, snappier, and just a bit smarter. It also replicates (and improves on) the **OptiFine experience** with modern alternatives—like **Iris** for shaders, **Sodium** for performance, and **Dynamic Lights** for immersive lighting—plus tons of features you won’t find in OptiFine or clients like Lunar or Badlion. > 💬 *Have a suggestion or ran into an issue? Leave a comment or hop in our Discord to get involved!* > 📌 [Join the Discord](https://discord.gg/McB4eXxkqB)
[![Scalacube Minecraft Servers](https://samlolo.github.io/Feather/resources/scalacube.jpg)](https://scalacube.com/p/_hosting_server_minecraft/3767960) --- ## ⚙️ Getting Started Feather is designed to be easy to install and play. Just follow the steps below for your platform of choice and you'll be in-game in minutes!
CurseForge Launcher 1. Click the `Install` button on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/feather-client). 2. Launch Minecraft via the **CurseForge Launcher**. 3. You're good to go — no setup required!
Modrinth Launcher 1. Search Feather in the **Modrinth App** and click `Install`. 2. Launch Minecraft from the installed profile. 3. Feather will auto-configure everything — jump right in!
Prism Launcher 1. Download the `.mrpack` file from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/feather). 2. In Prism, click **Add Instance → Import from zip/Modrinth**. 3. Select the `.mrpack`, and Prism will auto-install the pack. 4. Launch and enjoy!
--- ### ❓ FAQ
Do I need anything on the server? Not at all! All mods in Feather are 100% client-side, so you can safely join vanilla or multiplayer servers without any compatibility issues.
Can I add more mods? Absolutely. Feather is designed to be modular, so feel free to add more mods as long as they’re compatible with your chosen loader. However, we cannot guarantee support for all mods!
Does Feather include OptiFine? Nope — but that’s a good thing! Feather uses modern, better-performing alternatives like **Iris (for shaders)**, **Sodium (for FPS boosts)**, and **Dynamic Lights** to replicate and even improve on the OptiFine experience.
Will this boost my FPS? Yes, for almost everyone! Feather includes performance-focused mods like **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, and more — especially helpful for lower-end machines or laptop users.
Can I use shaders with Feather? Yes! Feather includes **Iris**, which supports most OptiFine shaders. Just drop your `.zip` shader packs into the `shaderpacks` folder and enable them in-game.
Where can I get help or suggest mods? Join the conversation on Discord: https://discord.gg/McB4eXxkqB You can also leave a comment on the modpack page or open an issue on GitHub if applicable.
